---
email: minh.huynh@monash.edu
title: Minh Huynh
description: Senior Lecturer in Statistics
www:   https://research.monash.edu/en/persons/minh-huynh/
github: m2huynh
interests:
- statistics education
- sport analytics
- data science
- applied statistics
user_groups:
- Faculty
- Current
image: avatar.jpg
---
